cot_prefix: Okay, let's figure this out. So the question is about Jane's birthday and figuring out the date one week from her 16th birthday. Let me break it down step by step. First, Jane was born on the last day of February in 2000. Now, February usually has 28 days, but in a leap year, it has 29. So Jane's birthday is on 02/29/2000. Today is her 16th birthday. But wait, 2000 + 16 is 2016. So her 16th birthday would be in 2016.
